stemHtml: What possible hazards should be considered when using the increased V<sub>2</sub> procedure to allow a higher RTOM (Regulated Take-Off Mass)?

options.b: The climb gradient will be worse than when using a normal V<sub>2 </sub>speed.
options.c: The thrust setting will be less than maximum, which will result in a reduced climb gradient.
options.d: Maximum tyre speed and V<sub>MBE</sub> will have to be re-checked due to increased V<sub>1</sub>, V<sub>R</sub> and V<sub>2</sub>.
